framework.name: MCP Server as API Proxy in OAuth Model
framework.description: Explicitly maps MCP server into the OAuth resource model as an 'API Proxy Server' — a middlebox between agent and resource servers. This means MCP auth isn't a separate problem; it's absorbed into the same OAuth extension. Further convergence evidence.
framework.raw_quote: industries have proposed Model Context Protocol(MCP). It introduces MCP server and protocol to let AI agents only communicate with the MCP server to request for resources.

source.title: Further considerations on AI Agent Authentication and Authorization ...
